mapper.select: SELECT IMAGE_ID, CARD_ID, IMAGE_TYPE, IMAGE_URL, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_NAME, FILE_SIZE, MIME_TYPE, IMAGE_WIDTH, IMAGE_HEIGHT, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT FROM CARD_IMAGES WHERE CARD_ID = #{cardId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC NULLS LAST
SELECT IMAGE_ID, CARD_ID, IMAGE_TYPE, IMAGE_URL, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_NAME, FILE_SIZE, MIME_TYPE, IMAGE_WIDTH, IMAGE_HEIGHT, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT FROM CARD_IMAGES WHERE IMAGE_ID = #{imageId}

SELECT IMAGE_ID, CARD_ID, IMAGE_TYPE, IMAGE_URL, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_NAME, FILE_SIZE, MIME_TYPE, IMAGE_WIDTH, IMAGE_HEIGHT, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT FROM CARD_IMAGES WHERE CARD_ID = #{cardId} AND IMAGE_TYPE = #{imageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR, javaType=String} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CARD_IMAGES ( card_id, image_type, image_url, original_name, stored_name, file_size, mime_type, image_width, image_height, sort_order, created_at )
SELECT #{img.cardId}, #{img.imageType}, #{img.imageUrl}, #{img.originalName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img.storedName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img.fileSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{img.mimeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img.imageWidth, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{img.imageHeight, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{img.sortOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1), SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' FROM DUAL
